question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here is the full list of hook events a charm can observe in Ops:

## Lifecycle

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `install` | Charm is installed |
| `start` | Unit should start the workload |
| `stop` | Unit should stop the workload |
| `remove` | Unit is being removed |
| `upgrade_charm` | Charm code has been upgraded |
| `config_changed` | Configuration has changed |
| `update_status` | Periodic status check |

## Leadership

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `leader_elected` | This unit has become leader |
| `leader_settings_changed` | Leader has written settings *(deprecated since v2.4.0)* |

## Relations (one set per relation name in metadata)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<relation>_relation_created` | A relation has been created |
| `<relation>_relation_joined` | A remote unit has joined |
| `<relation>_relation_changed` | Relation data has changed |
| `<relation>_relation_departed` | A remote unit has departed |
| `<relation>_relation_broken` | The relation is being removed |

## Storage (one set per storage name in metadata)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<storage>_storage_attached` | Storage is ready |
| `<storage>_storage_detaching` | Storage is about to be removed |

## Containers / Pebble (Kubernetes charms, one set per container)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<container>_pebble_ready` | Pebble in the container is ready |
| `<container>_pebble_custom_notice` | A custom notice was posted to Pebble |

## Secrets

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `secret_changed` | A secret this unit is observing has a new revision |
| `secret_expired` | A secret rotation has expired |
| `secret_rotate` | A secret should be rotated |
| `secret_remove` | An old secret revision can be removed |

## Actions (one per action defined in metadata)

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `<action>_action` | The named action has been run |

## Status Collection

| Event | Description |
|---|---|
| `collect_unit_status` | Ops is collecting the unit status |
| `collect_app_status` | Ops is collecting the app status (leader only) |

## Deprecated / Removed

| Event | Notes |
|---|---|
| `pre_series_upgrade` | Removed in Juju 4.0 |
| `post_series_upgrade` | Removed in Juju 4.0 |
| `collect_metrics` | Removed in Juju 3.6.11 |
